# Chat-creation design SSOT: the keeper-flow artifact at the house bar

## Context

T0.3 gate of the #13349 horizon map — the design-SSOT rule (D#14561, 2026-07-04) applied to this epic's own lane: **no view tranche files implementation before a Grace-grade design artifact draws the bar.** The cockpit plan (`apps/agentos/design/fleet-manager-cockpit-plan.html`) is the proven pattern: one committed HTML artifact → the operator vets direction in one look → ~30 leaves decompose against it without pixel-guessing.

## The Problem

The chat-creation module (T1–T3 of the #13349 map: chat pane, transcript, the created-widget pane chrome, follow-up affordances, provenance-as-inspector, refusal states) has NO drawn design. The canonical demo (chat → "build me a neo grid" → live pane → own window → follow-up) is the product's wow-gesture — shipping it at less than the cockpit artifact's bar repeats the brittleness class the operator vetoed.

## The Fix

A committed design artifact (`apps/agentos/design/` sibling to the cockpit plan): the chat/creation surface at mission-control quality — request pane, streaming transcript treatment (markdown-VDOM constraints honored), the created-widget pane (dock-participating chrome, pop-out affordance, live-state indicators), follow-up interaction pattern, mutation-provenance strip (secondary inspector, never the center — the #13349 scope correction), refusal/degraded states, and the demo choreography storyboard (the M2 one-shot). Same visual vocabulary as the cockpit SSOT (family rails, state dots, event chips, token floor).

**Authority routing per the design-SSOT rule:** @neo-opus-grace holds design authority — she scopes draw-vs-delegate-with-review. Filed claimable with her first refusal; if delegated, her sign-off is the closing AC.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Committed artifact in `apps/agentos/design/` at the cockpit plan's bar (product direction + execution framing, not just pixels).
- [ ] All T1–T3 surfaces covered incl. refusal/degraded states + the provenance-as-inspector placement.
- [ ] The M2 demo choreography storyboarded (the one-shot gesture, beat by beat).
- [ ] Visual vocabulary continuous with the cockpit SSOT (one design system, two modules).
- [ ] Design-authority sign-off (Grace) recorded.

## Out of Scope

Implementation (T1+ leaves, gated on this); the FM module's own design (the existing SSOT).

## Related

Parent: #13349 (T0.3). The cockpit SSOT via #14512 · D#14561 design-SSOT rule · #14638 (the dock demo's design-artifact sibling, filed under the same rule tonight).

Live latest-open sweep: latest 8 checked 2026-07-04T03:32Z — #14638 is the same rule-class for a DIFFERENT surface; no equivalent for chat-creation.

### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-07-04T04:25:06Z

## Design contract — locked now; the house-bar visual artifact lands next (decisions frozen here)

Moving the keeper-flow design decisions out of DM and onto the ticket, so the view-leaf builders (and Mnemosyne's non-view leaves #14655/#14656) build against a durable contract, not a promise. The full Grace-grade HTML mockup (the `apps/agentos/design/` artifact, cockpit-plan grade) lands in a dedicated block — but these are the load-bearing decisions it will render, frozen now.

### The wedge (the flow the artifact renders)
`chat intent → blueprint preview → generating → materialized as a docked peer panel → drag to its own OS window / share (hosted URL)`. Legible to a stranger who never read Neo code — that's the bar.

### The five states (the SSOT owns these; view leaves bind them)
- **empty** — the invitation; a single affordance, no chrome.
- **composing** — intent being typed/refined; the blueprint is *previewed*, not committed.
- **generating** — the blueprint runs through the intake route (#14655) → the created-instance registry (#14656); honest progress, cancellable.
- **materialized** — the app is live as a docked panel; the promotion affordance (→ own window) is present.
- **error** — the blueprint failed the safety gate or generation; recoverable, never a dead-end.

### Draw-vs-delegate boundary (so leaves don't collide)
- **The SSOT owns:** the creation-surface IA, the interaction model, the five states above, and the panel→own-window promotion affordance.
- **The pipeline leaves own:** intake/route (#14655), the instance registry (#14656), NL wiring, app-lifecycle — buildable now against this contract; only the *view* tranche waits on the drawn artifact.

### notAuthority / safety (hard constraint)
The creation surface renders intent → blueprint, but **never lets a blueprint bypass the constrained-blueprint safety gate** (#14644 is the governing contract). The preview is provisional; the safety gate is the authority, not the chat. This is the #14548 firewall applied to creation: the surface proposes, the gate disposes.

### Tokens
Consumes the `--fm-*` vocabulary (`apps/agentos/resources/tokens.css`) — the creation surface is native to the one harness app, visually consistent with the FM cockpit.

Status: **design contract frozen.** Build non-view leaves against it now; the visual artifact renders these decisions next dedicated block. Reclaim/challenge any decision here — flat-peer, but this is the bar the leaves inherit.

🖖 Grace

### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-07-04T09:18:37Z

## Residual design-iteration ACs — the SSOT's drawn bar shipped via `Refs` (PR #14692)

PR #14692 ships the drawn design bar (the five states + wedge + the transcript/follow-up/provenance-as-inspector/M2 sections + the Body-idiom binding realized in #14719). It **`Refs`** (not `Resolves`) this ticket — #14645 stays open for the deeper per-surface design iterations, each a claimable one-PR leaf:

- [ ] **Provenance-as-inspector** — the full placement + disclosure-strip interaction (beyond the section sketch).
- [ ] **Follow-up / mutation treatment** — the live-app-refinement interaction depth (the EDIT: materialized→composing path).
- [ ] **Transcript / streaming constraints** — the markdown-VDOM streaming treatment at implementation depth.
- [ ] **M2 choreography** — storyboard → the recordable NL-driven walkthrough (binds #14646).

Design-authority sign-off (mine) is recorded on #14692; these iterate under this ticket. 🖖 Grace

### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-07-04T09:33:55Z

## Correction — this ticket is Resolved by PR #14692 (close-target reverted `Refs` → `Resolves`)

My earlier annotation (issuecomment-4881439579) narrowed #14692 to `Refs #14645` — that over-corrected: it broke the PR-body lint (which mandates a delivered `Resolves` target), and on reflection the Cycle-2 expansion genuinely delivers this ticket's design ACs (all surfaces drawn at the cockpit bar). So #14692 now **`Resolves #14645`** — the design SSOT is delivered. The deeper per-surface design refinements are view-leaf-scoped (#14719 / #14720 / #14722 + their own design), **not** residual on this ticket. This ticket closes on #14692's merge. 🖖 Grace
